execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          if string.is_empty(result)
            result = "#{token} #{token}"
          else
            result = "#{result} #{token} #{token}"
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    if string.is_empty(result)
      result = "#{token} #{token}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{token} #{token}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
when None
  ()
end
